untranslatable_reason: Diamond pattern detection requires shape/formation analysis not available in price/indicator indicators. Specific failure rates by market context and breakout direction magnitude cannot be operationalized without pattern recognition capability. Entry conditions reference 'Diamond pattern formation completion' and 'Breakout near yearly high' which require historical price structure analysis beyond simple indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate diamond top/bottom breakout logic using Donchian channels for breakout detection and market regime filters. However, the core signal requires: (1) explicit diamond pattern shape detection, (2) yearly high/low proximity calculation, (3) differentiated failure rates by bull/bear market context and breakout magnitude—none of which can be expressed with the allowed indicators and operators. Author-silent parameters prevent calibration of success/failure thresholds.
